calendarNotes: In-world days: Vol1 Ch1=day0 (Rapture morning). Ch2–10=days1–9. Day10 intentionally unused (arc break). Ch11–30=days11–30. See seed/outlines/vol-01.json.

chapters.title: The Last Ordinary Morning
chapters.synopsis: Cassian's ordinary Tuesday in Ashford ends when the sky fractures over the harbor.

chapters.title: The Sound Above
chapters.synopsis: Rowan's family morning; fire department overwhelmed; something emerges from the fracture.

chapters.title: Falling Fire
chapters.synopsis: Adrian and Selene; first dragon; city under attack.

chapters.title: When The World Ended
chapters.synopsis: Civilization collapses in real time; monsters emerge; mass panic.

chapters.title: Day Zero
chapters.synopsis: Marcus protects Iris and Lily; evacuation fails; government crumbles.

chapters.title: The Photographer
chapters.synopsis: Nora trapped outside city; witnesses monster migration; forced into wilderness.

chapters.title: The First Night
chapters.synopsis: First true survival night; isolation; sounds in the dark.

chapters.title: The Things In The Dark
chapters.synopsis: First monster encounter; barely survives; awakening signs.

chapters.title: No Rescue Is Coming
chapters.synopsis: Government and military fail; last emergency systems die.

chapters.title: The Last Broadcast
chapters.synopsis: Humanity understands civilization is finished. Ends: We are alone.

chapters.title: Hunger
chapters.synopsis: First week scarcity; Cassian counts remaining food.

chapters.title: The Gathering
chapters.synopsis: Survivor cluster forms; first rationing arguments.

chapters.title: Still Searching
chapters.synopsis: Adrian searches for family; finds only ruins and monsters.

chapters.title: Tracks
chapters.synopsis: Nora learns to read the new wilderness; maps begin.

chapters.title: Notes
chapters.synopsis: Marcus documents first mana observations from specimens.

chapters.title: The Wait
chapters.synopsis: Selene waits for Adrian; abandonment fear seeds (subtle).

chapters.title: Crossed Paths
chapters.synopsis: Cast paths cross without reunion; shared sky, separate hells.

chapters.title: First Blood
chapters.synopsis: First deliberate monster kill; cost of survival.

chapters.title: What We Lost
chapters.synopsis: Elena treats wounded; names the dead.

chapters.title: Scattered Again
chapters.synopsis: Fragile groups split under pressure; arc B closes.

chapters.title: Leaving
chapters.synopsis: Cassian leaves Ashford; notes defensible structures.

chapters.title: The Road
chapters.synopsis: Nora maps shifting roads; reality wrong.

chapters.title: Patterns
chapters.synopsis: Monster behavior is territorial, not random.

chapters.title: Letters Unsent
chapters.synopsis: Selene writes messages Adrian may never read.

chapters.title: Smoke On The Horizon
chapters.synopsis: Distant fires; other survivors rumored.

chapters.title: The Quiet Between
chapters.synopsis: Brief calm; Adrian chooses who to protect.

chapters.title: Wrong Stars
chapters.synopsis: Impossible night sky; Limbo foreshadow (subtle).

chapters.title: Older Than Us
chapters.synopsis: Ancient ruin glimpsed; humanity was not first.

chapters.title: The Earth Trembles
chapters.synopsis: Shared tremor across regions; something vast stirring below.

chapters.title: Beyond The Ruins
chapters.synopsis: Colossal structure rises — first dungeon. Volume ends.
